title: Ensure mobile-responsive layout
description: Layout works on 320px+ viewports. No horizontal scroll. Readable line lengths. Touch-friendly toggle.

steps.details: Use dev tools responsive mode. Verify no overflow, content fits.
Add max-w-prose or max-w-2xl to content block. Center with mx-auto.
ThemeToggle button: min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] or padding for touch.
